# monad-gas — Full Technical Reference

## Architecture

TypeScript CLI tool built with Commander, tsup (bundler), vitest (testing).

### File structure

```
src/
  cli.ts          CLI interface (Commander)
  estimator.ts    Core gas estimation + comparison logic
  presets.ts      6 preset transaction builders
  reporter.ts     Terminal (ANSI) + JSON output formatting
  rpc.ts          JSON-RPC 2.0 client (eth_estimateGas, eth_gasPrice)
  types.ts        TypeScript interfaces
  index.ts        Public API barrel exports
test/
  estimator.test.ts   Unit tests for conversion functions
  presets.test.ts     Unit tests for preset builders
  reporter.test.ts    Unit tests for output formatting
  rpc.test.ts         Unit tests for RPC calls (mocked fetch)
social/
  card.html           Social card template
  card.png            Generated social card (Playwright screenshot)
  screenshot.ts       Playwright screenshot script
```

### Key interfaces

```typescript
interface TransactionCall {
  from?: string;
  to: string;
  data?: string;
  value?: string;
}

interface GasEstimate {
  gasLimit: bigint;           // What you PAY for on Monad
  estimatedGasUsed: bigint;   // What the tx actually consumes
  gasPrice: bigint;           // Gas price in wei
  totalFee: bigint;           // gasLimit * gasPrice (what you pay)
  usedFee: bigint;            // estimatedGasUsed * gasPrice (ideal cost)
  wastedGas: bigint;          // gasLimit - estimatedGasUsed
  wastePercent: string;       // Percentage of gas wasted
  estimatedCostMon: string;   // Total cost in MON
  estimatedCostUsd: string | null;
}

interface GasComparison {
  monad: GasEstimate;
  ethereum: { gasEstimate: bigint; gasPrice: bigint; estimatedCostEth: string; estimatedCostUsd: string | null } | null;
  savings: { percentage: string; absoluteMon: string } | null;
}

interface RpcConfig {
  monadRpc: string;
  ethereumRpc?: string;
  monPriceUsd?: number;
  ethPriceUsd?: number;
  gasLimitMultiplier?: number;  // Default 1.2
}

type PresetType = "transfer" | "erc20-transfer" | "erc20-approve" | "swap" | "nft-mint" | "deploy";
```

### Monad-specific behavior

1. eth_estimateGas returns estimated gas consumption (gas_used)
2. The gasLimitMultiplier is applied to get the actual gas_limit
3. Total cost = gas_limit * gas_price (no refund for unused gas)
4. Waste = gas_limit - estimated_gas_used

### RPC endpoints

- Mainnet: https://rpc.monad.xyz (Chain ID 143)
- Standard eth_estimateGas and eth_gasPrice methods
- No L1 oracle calls needed (Monad is an L1)

### Build and test

```bash
npm install
npm run build    # tsup
npm test         # vitest
npm run lint     # tsc --noEmit
```

### Package distribution

- npm package with CJS + ESM + TypeScript declarations
- CLI binary at dist/cli.js
- Published to npm as "monad-gas"
